---
title: "Outdoor lighting and active travel: A high-resolution analysis using satellite imagery and strava data in glasgow"
description: "Eugeni Vidal-Tortosa, Eva Heinen, Jim Uttley, Demet Yesiltepe, Steve Fotios, and Robin Lovelace (2026). Outdoor lighting and active travel: A high-resolution analysis using satellite imagery and strava data in glasgow. *Journal of Transport & Health*. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jth.2025.102224"
date: "2026-02-01"
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
citation-key: "vidal-tortosa_outdoor_lighting_2026"
citation-type: "article-journal"
citation-type-label: "Journal Article"
venue: "Journal of Transport & Health"
doi: "10.1016/j.jth.2025.102224"
publication-url: "https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S2214140525002440"
authors:
  - "Eugeni Vidal-Tortosa"
  - "Eva Heinen"
  - "Jim Uttley"
  - "Demet Yesiltepe"
  - "Steve Fotios"
  - "Robin Lovelace"
---

**Type:** Journal Article
**Venue:** Journal of Transport & Health
**Year:** 2026

[DOI](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jth.2025.102224) [Publisher Link](https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S2214140525002440) [BibTeX](entry.bib)

## Citation

Eugeni Vidal-Tortosa, Eva Heinen, Jim Uttley, Demet Yesiltepe, Steve Fotios, and Robin Lovelace (2026). Outdoor lighting and active travel: A high-resolution analysis using satellite imagery and strava data in glasgow. *Journal of Transport & Health*. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jth.2025.102224

## BibTeX

```bibtex
@article{vidal-tortosa_outdoor_lighting_2026,
  title = {Outdoor lighting and active travel: A high-resolution analysis using satellite imagery and Strava data in Glasgow},
  author = {Vidal-Tortosa, Eugeni and Heinen, Eva and Uttley, Jim and Yesiltepe, Demet and Fotios, Steve and Lovelace, Robin},
  date = {2026-02},
  journaltitle = {Journal of Transport & Health},
  volume = {46},
  issn = {2214-1405},
  doi = {10.1016/j.jth.2025.102224},
  url = {https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S2214140525002440},
  pages = {102224},
  langid = {english}
}
```

## Notes

{{< include _notes.qmd >}}
